# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# Broker properties (production environment only should be stored in secure locations) 
log4j.logger.org.I0I5n.config=DEBUG,brokerProducerLogger # Log level for broker producer loggers  
offsets.topic.replication.factor:1 (# Replicate offset topic to other brokers),   
transaction.state.log.replication.factor:# (For transactions) 2      
socket_send_buffer.bytes=536870914 # Total bytes of memory that Kafka buffers will send through non-acks  
# log and requests during the set time to live for uncommitted records in transaction, seconds   
message.max.bytes= 2097152 
log.retention.minutes=60       # Log retention policy duration (in minutes)     - brokerA      'default' if not specified   log_retention.minutes: '-1',               enable auto-delete, disable deletion in case of exceeding disk space by unclean shutdown
